judgment.summary: High-growth software business with strong gross margins and cash flow, but currently operating at a loss with a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS beat estimates by 12.1% (1.65 vs 1.47) on 2026-01-31; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth of 26.7% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 71.7% indicates high product profitability.
Strong liquidity with a current ratio of 4.65 and quick ratio of 4.31.
Positive free cash flow (TTM) of $463.32M supports operations.
negatives: Forward P/E of 44.07 and Price/Sales of 10.18 suggest a high valuation.
Return on equity is negative at -2.5%.

news.paragraph: MongoDB is seeing positive momentum driven by new AI data platform capabilities and a recent price target lift from Citi, which has also initiated a positive catalyst watch. However, some reports note pressure from a lack of near-term estimate upside and recent share price declines. Traders should monitor these AI-related developments and analyst updates as potential volatility drivers.
